name: 时态错配炼狱 · 亦真亦假
desc: ☠ 炼狱单项突破：时态线索亦真亦假混排，专治 has gone/has been、for+时间段、by the time/by next、主将从现、间接引语时态呼应等高频时态陷阱。初三冲刺·中考拔尖。

m1: 现在完成时（持续到现在）have done
过去完成时（过去的过去）had done
过去进行时（那一刻正在做）was doing
as soon as you finish（从句表将来）
It is the first time that...
间接引语时态后移（过去的过去）

m4.q: I ___ this book for two weeks, but I still haven't finished it.
m4.why: for two weeks 持续到现在 + haven't finished → 现在完成 have had；have（own）是状态动词不用进行时。

m4.q: By the time we got to the cinema, the film ___.
m4.why: By the time + 过去(got) → 主句过去完成 had begun（过去的过去）。

m4.q: Listen! Someone ___ in the next room.
m4.why: Listen! 提示此刻正在 → 现在进行 is crying。

m4.q: — Where is Tom? — He ___ to the library; he'll be back soon.
m4.why: 人不在、去了还没回 → has gone to（去了那里没回）；has been to 表去过已回，与‘还没回来’矛盾。

m4.q: I'll call you as soon as I ___ home tonight.
m4.why: as soon as 引导时间状语从句、主将从现 → 一般现在 get。

m4.q: This is the first time I ___ such a wonderful Beijing opera.
m4.why: This is the first time (that) 从句固定用现在完成 → have seen。

m4.q: He ___ in that factory for thirty years before he retired last month.
m4.why: 动作已随 retired last month 终止、未延续到现在 → 一般过去 worked；has worked / has been working 都要求延续到说话此刻，works 是现在时，均与已结束的过去矛盾。

m4.q: When I was a child, I ___ to school every day.
m4.why: When I was a child 是过去习惯 → 一般过去 walked；was walking 强调某刻正在走，与 every day 习惯不符。

m4.q: Our teacher told us that the moon ___ around the earth.
m4.why: 客观真理在间接引语中时态不后移 → 一般现在 moves。

m5.q: — Has Mr. Lee come back? — Yes, he ___ to Shanghai, and he is in the office now.
m5.why: 他现在就在办公室（已回）→ has been to（去过已回）；has gone to 表去了没回，与‘now in the office’矛盾。

m5.q: They ___ the new gym by the end of next month.
m5.why: by + 将来时间(next month) → 将来完成 will have finished（到将来某时已完成）；had finished / have finished / finished 都不含将来意义，与 next month 矛盾。

m5.q: It ___ heavily when I left the house this morning.
m5.why: when I left（过去某刻）正在下 → 过去进行 was raining。

m5.q: My pen pal and I ___ each other since we met online last year.
m5.why: since + 过去点、持续到现在 → 现在完成 haven't seen。

m5.q: My aunt ___ English in this school for ten years, and she still teaches here now.
m5.why: for ten years + still teaches now（持续到现在）→ 现在完成 has taught。

m5.q: He asked me where I ___ the day before.
m5.why: 间接引语 + the day before（过去的过去）→ 过去完成 had gone。

m5.q: Look at the dark clouds! It ___.
m5.why: 有迹象(clouds)预测将来 → be going to rain；非一般现在、非过去。

m5.q: By the end of last term, we ___ five hundred English words.
m5.why: By the end of last term（过去时间点之前）→ 过去完成 had learned。

m5.q: — You look exhausted. — Yes, I ___ in the garden all morning.
m5.why: all morning 持续到说话现在、且 look exhausted 是现在结果 → 现在完成进行 have been working。
